name: Nia
title: Fractured Future

abilities.name: Avoid Doom
abilities.text: When this model flips the black joker, it may drain a (t) to discard it without effect and flip a new card.

abilities.name: Happy Hour
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may replace itself with Nia, Life of the Party and heal 2.

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

actions.name: Wrist Blade
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is in base contact with this model this attack receives a (+).

triggers.name: Divergent Path
triggers.text: Once per activation. This model may declare an action printed on its other title.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Execute
triggers.text: The target may either discard a card or drain a (fortitude). If it does neither, it is killed.

actions.name: Dead Shot
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may not target the same model more than once per activation.
actions.effects: The target may either discard a card or drain a (fortitude). If it does neither, it is killed.

actions.name: Adrenaline Rush
actions.effects: This model declares a general action. If it has half of its maximum health or less, the generated action ignores engagement and "once per" restrictions.

extraction_notes: Fortitude icon rendered as (fortitude) in trigger suit for Divergent Path and in effect text for Execute and Dead Shot
